arts.sum: Yang and Kwon are in line for their big international breakthroughs

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers agrees with Martin O'Neill over the 'challenge' of Celtic fans amid Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Martin O’Neill and Brendan Rodgers agree over ‘expectation’ of the Celtic fans in Europe Yes, Celtic’s 2-1 defeat to Bayern Munich in the first leg of their Champions League playoff tie was disappointing, but there is a fighting chance heading to Bavaria on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Celtic handed good omen as lucky charm ref set to take charge of Bayern Munich Champions League clash
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany's Bundesliga leaders hold a precious one-goal advantage over the Hoops ahead of the second leg playoff

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayern Munich XI v Celtic: Defensive changes for Bayern
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany is expected to make two changes to his Bayern Munich team that beat Celtic 2-1 at Parkhead last week as they look to secure a place in the…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Celtic: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers confirmed that the Celtic first-team squad has a clean bill of health heading into tonight’s big Champions League tie. Celtic will play Bayern Munich in the second leg of their Champions League playoff in the Allianz Arena on Tuesday, February 18 with kick-off scheduled for 8pm GMT .

arts.ttl: Ex-Celtic ace shuts down arrogant German media over Bayern poser
arts.sum: Ex-Celtic ace shuts down arrogant German media over Bayern poser.

arts.ttl: Celtic get Champions League red carpet rolled out for them as Alan Shearer heads up all-star Amazon cast
arts.sum: The Newcastle United legend will join the likes of Neil Lennon and Clarence Seedorf on Amazon Prime

arts.sum: Harry Kane has made up his mind already 👀

arts.ttl: Troy Deeney and Jeff Stelling make 'folklore' claim ahead of Celtic's clash against Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Troy Deeney and Jeff Stelling rate Celtic’s chances against Bayern Munich I don’t think this is the best Bayern Munich team, with Vincent Kompany, the way that they play and it’s very expansive.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers ends striker debate as Celtic boss makes Bayern Munich call, Champions League predicted XI
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers heads into the game knowing that Celti c need to win by a clear two goals after the Bhoys lost to Bayern Munich in the first leg 2-1 at Celtic Park. Adam Idah will be the man to lead Celtic’s line as Rodgers looks to win at Bayern.
